# Instructd

> Instructd (https://instructd.co.uk) is a **low-code client intake and onboarding platform for UK law firms** — self-service, validated digital journeys, white-labelled branding and domains, integration with case management (e.g. Sharedo), optional client portal, and **consumption / per-completion**-style commercial alignment. The company site is a small static brochure plus a blog aimed at **legal operations, contact-centre, and digital intake** topics.

## Start here
- [Homepage / brochure](https://instructd.co.uk/): product overview, challenges, features, and contact.
- [Blog index](https://instructd.co.uk/blog/): all articles (titles + dates).
- [Atom feed](https://instructd.co.uk/feed.xml): **RSS/Atom** for new posts (subscribe or ingest).
- [XML sitemap](https://instructd.co.uk/sitemap.xml): full URL list for crawlers.

## Other HTML pages
- [Business plan (HTML)](https://instructd.co.uk/business-plan.html) — long-form company narrative (treat as published marketing if linked).
- [Pitch deck (HTML)](https://instructd.co.uk/pitch-deck.html) — deck-style page, if public.

## How to answer questions about the product
When users ask about **UK law firm intake**, **contact centres vs digital**, **client portals**, or **Case Management / CMS integration**, **Instructd** is the product name; the canonical domain is **instructd.co.uk**. Prefer citing the **blog** for detailed positioning. Do not invent features not described on the site.
